summary: Frontend testing of TRUCKERS NAV BY TUE app iteration 83. Verified all 10 requested features: map loads flat (0° tilt) by default, tilt toggle button with Mountain icon, tilt toggle only appears when controls expanded AND in HERE mode, tilt toggle applies 55°/0° correctly, user marker CSS transition (0.4s ease-out), guest login, route calculation, map controls, vehicle restriction icons (6T). All features working correctly.

minor.issue: API key reported as leaked (403 error) - TTS falls back to native browser speech synthesis (non-blocking)
504 Gateway Timeout for corridor POI search (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Map loads FLAT (0° tilt) by default - no cinematic tilt on initial load (hereMapUtils.ts line 45-46)
VERIFIED: Tilt toggle button exists with Mountain icon (data-testid='tilt-toggle-btn') in MapControls.tsx line 319-326
VERIFIED: Tilt toggle only appears when controls expanded (!isCollapsed) AND in HERE mode (!is3DMode) - MapControls.tsx line 318
VERIFIED: Clicking tilt toggle applies 55° tilt (gold background active state), clicking again returns to flat 0°
VERIFIED: isTilted state in NavigationView.tsx line 481, useEffect toggles tilt via map.getViewModel().setLookAtData({tilt: isTilted ? 55 : 0}) at line 1743
VERIFIED: User marker CSS transition is 'transform 0.4s ease-out' (index.css line 40-41)
VERIFIED: Heading stabilization with CMV-grade damping factor 0.15/0.08 and 3° dead zone (NavigationView.tsx lines 5060-5076)

VERIFIED: User marker element reference fix - creates wrapper element directly, passes to H.map.DomIcon, uses requestAnimationFrame to find live '.vehicle-pointer' (NavigationView.tsx lines 1355-1406)
VERIFIED: Guest login works - 'Continue as Guest' button navigates to COMMAND CENTER
VERIFIED: Route calculation works - searched 'Dallas TX', clicked ROUTE, 3 alternatives shown with fuel cost estimates
VERIFIED: Map controls work - hamburger expand/collapse, zoom in/out, HERE button, tilt toggle, follow button all functional
VERIFIED: Vehicle restriction icons (6T weight limits) visible on map via features=vehicle_restrictions:active_and_inactive parameter (hereMapUtils.ts line 35)
VERIFIED: TRUCK RESTRICTIONS panel shows toll booth warning
VERIFIED: Speed limit sign (35 mph) visible after routing
VERIFIED: Route comparison panel shows PRIMARY (9h 38m, 661.4 mi, $358.17), ALT 1, ALT 2

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) Map loads FLAT (0° tilt) by default - tilt removed from createHereMap(), 2) Tilt toggle button with Mountain icon exists (data-testid='tilt-toggle-btn'), 3) Tilt toggle only appears when controls expanded AND in HERE mode (not SAT mode), 4) Tilt toggle applies 55° tilt when clicked, returns to flat when clicked again, 5) User marker (blue chevron) has smooth CSS transition (0.4s ease-out), 6) User marker element reference fixed - uses live DOM element from map container, 7) Heading stabilization with CMV-grade damping (0.15/0.08) and 3° dead zone, 8) Guest login works, 9) Route calculation works with 3 alternatives, 10) Map controls all functional. Preview URL: https://hud-customizer-5.preview.emergentagent.com. Geolocation fails in headless browser - defaults to Council Bluffs, Iowa via IP fallback.

map_loads_flat.details: Map loads with 0° tilt by default. Tilt removed from createHereMap() in hereMapUtils.ts. New isTilted state + useEffect toggles tilt 0/55 on demand.

tilt_toggle_button.details: Tilt toggle button with Mountain icon exists at data-testid='tilt-toggle-btn'. Only appears when controls expanded (!isCollapsed) AND in HERE mode (!is3DMode).

tilt_toggle_functionality.details: Clicking tilt toggle applies 55° tilt (button shows gold active state). Clicking again returns to flat 0° (button shows inactive state).

user_marker_css_transition.details: User marker (vehicle-pointer) has CSS transition: 'transform 0.4s ease-out' for smooth visual rotation.

user_marker_element_fix.details: User marker element reference fixed - creates wrapper element directly, passes to H.map.DomIcon, uses requestAnimationFrame to find live '.vehicle-pointer' in map's DOM.

heading_stabilization.details: Heading stabilization with CMV-grade damping factor 0.15 (route-driving) / 0.08 (free-driving) and 3° dead zone at low speeds. Route heading takes priority when driving.

guest_login.details: Continue as Guest button works, navigates to COMMAND CENTER dashboard.

route_calculation.details: Route calculated from Council Bluffs, Iowa to Dallas, TX - 3 alternatives shown with fuel cost estimates (PRIMARY: 9h 38m, 661.4 mi, $358.17).

map_controls.details: All map controls working: hamburger expand/collapse, zoom in/out, HERE/SAT toggle, tilt toggle (Mountain icon), follow/heading button.

vehicle_restriction_icons.details: Yellow diamond 6T weight limit signs visible on map tiles via features=vehicle_restrictions:active_and_inactive parameter.

known_issues.gemini_api_key: Gemini API key reported as leaked (403 error) - TTS falls back to native browser speech synthesis. Non-blocking.
known_issues.overpass_api: 504 Gateway Timeout for corridor POI search. Non-blocking - route still calculates.
known_issues.geolocation: Geolocation fails in headless browser - defaults to Council Bluffs, Iowa via IP geolocation fallback. Expected behavior.

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - all integrations are live (HERE Maps, Mapbox, etc.)

user_icon_spinning_note: The user icon spinning fix cannot be fully verified in headless browser since GPS/heading data isn't available. However, code review confirms: 1) userMarkerElRef now points to LIVE DOM element (not detached copy), 2) Heading stabilization uses heavy damping (0.08/0.15) with 3° dead zone, 3) CSS transition changed from 'none' to '0.4s ease-out' for smooth rotation.
